project_files.status: Updated to mark subtask 1.3 as completed
Updated to mark subtask 1.3 as completed

architecture.description: Uses Completer-based queuing to share single refresh operation among multiple requests

async_handling.description: Uses Dart Completers to manage pending requests and resolve them all with the same result

error_handling.description: Wraps unexpected errors in AuthException and propagates to all queued requests

time_management.description: Tracks time spent in queue for each request and implements 30-second timeout

async_race_conditions.issue: Potential race conditions when multiple requests are enqueued simultaneously
async_race_conditions.mitigation: Immediate flag setting before async operation starts

memory_leaks.issue: Pending completers could cause memory leaks if not properly cancelled
memory_leaks.mitigation: Timeout handling and proper cleanup in clearQueue method

exception_handling.issue: Need to wrap non-AuthExceptions to maintain consistent error types
exception_handling.mitigation: Catch-all clause that wraps unexpected errors in AuthException

approach_outcome.approach: Implement queue-based refresh manager using Completers
success_factors: Prevents duplicate refresh calls to underlying service
Shares single refresh operation among all queued requests
Provides consistent results for all queued requests

technical_quality.code_quality: High - well-structured with clear separation of concerns
technical_quality.test_coverage: Extensive - covers success, failure, timeout, and concurrent scenarios

integration: Integrate RefreshQueueManager with AuthRepository to prevent duplicate refresh calls
Use the queue manager as a wrapper around TokenRefreshService
Expose queue status (isRefreshing, queueLength) for monitoring
optimization: Consider adding request priority for refresh vs. other auth operations
Implement exponential backoff for queue timeouts to improve reliability
Add metrics collection for queue performance monitoring
testing: Add integration tests with real TokenRefreshService
Test performance under high concurrent request load
Validate queue behavior with different network conditions
